title: taraxacum polozhiae
intro: Taraxacum polozhiae, also known as Polozhii's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the Russian Far East and Northeast China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain taraxasterol and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum polozhiae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver function, making it a popular remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Taraxacum polozhiae is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
